acceptance_criteria: VFI efficiency >= 97.0% at 100% load witnessed on site
Battery autonomy >= 10 min at full load discharge test
COP >= 6.3 at AHRI conditions trended over 4 load steps
Shaft vibration <= 4 mils at all load points per ISO 10816-3
Door-fan integrity: retention >= 10 min and peak <= 25 Pa
Puff test + discharge simulation within listed discharge time
Pull-the-plug integrated systems test with full IT load bank
